span_mappings.nl_span: every state has orbit period dividing 24 under the QA T-step

formal_statement: theorem qa_t_period_divides_24 : ∀ s : ZMod 9 × ZMod 9, (qa_t_step9^[24]) s = s
natural_language_claim: Every state in ZMod 9 × ZMod 9 has orbit period dividing 24 under the QA T-step; equivalently, the Fibonacci matrix F satisfies F^24 = I in GL₂(ZMod 9).
